description: Create and activate a secure voting survey for the '2025 Employee Benefits Vote' in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). The survey must be configured with anonymized responses and an initialized participant table. Include a custom token attribute named 'EmployeeID' (Description: 'Employee ID Number') and enable public registration. The registration email must use the subject 'Your Voting Link - 2025 Benefits' and include the phrase 'Your vote is anonymous' in the body.
